title: Choosing A Side
summary:
Main
Throughout the war in Ukraine, key buyers of Russian commodities such as India, China, Turkey and Brazil have managed to walk a tightrope between the US, EU and Russia. These countries have benefitted from discounted Russian energy and undisrupted trade to the US and EU over the past three years. However, now that dynamic is changing.
